title: ～に対して
titleEn: Expresses toward, against, in contrast to, or in response to
explanation: Dùng để chỉ đối tượng, hướng tác động, thái độ hoặc phản ứng đối với một người/sự việc; cũng có thể dùng để đối chiếu hai tình huống. Cấu trúc: Noun + に対して.
explanationEn: The ～に対して grammar point is used to indicate a direction or target, showing an action or attitude towards something or someone. It can also be used to show a contrast between two situations or to express in response to an action or situation
editorialSources: Hanabira grammar JSON (source import)
JLPT Vietnam / JLPT Sensei Vietnam (manual QA reference only)
JLPT Global / JLPT Sensei / Practice Japanese (manual QA reference only)

title: ～に応えて
titleEn: Responding to; living up to; meeting
explanation: Dùng khi hành động được thực hiện để đáp lại yêu cầu, kỳ vọng, lời mời hoặc tình huống nào đó. Có thể hiểu là “đáp lại”, “đáp ứng”. Cấu trúc: Noun + に応えて.
explanationEn: The ～に応えて grammar point is used to express an action in response to something (an expectation, request, or situation). It can be translated as responding to, living up to, or meeting in English. This grammar point is generally used with nouns or noun phrases
editorialSources: Hanabira grammar JSON (source import)
JLPT Vietnam / JLPT Sensei Vietnam (manual QA reference only)
JLPT Global / JLPT Sensei / Practice Japanese (manual QA reference only)

title: ～に応じて
titleEn: In accordance with, depending on, in response to
explanation: Dùng khi cách xử lý, mức độ hoặc kết quả thay đổi tùy theo điều kiện được nêu. Có thể hiểu là “tùy theo”, “phù hợp với”, “ứng với”. Cấu trúc: Noun + に応じて.
explanationEn: The ～に応じて grammar point is used to express something that varies according to a certain condition or responds to a change. It can be translated as in accordance with, depending on, or in response to in English. The formation is used with nouns
editorialSources: Hanabira grammar JSON (source import)
JLPT Vietnam / JLPT Sensei Vietnam (manual QA reference only)
JLPT Global / JLPT Sensei / Practice Japanese (manual QA reference only)

title: ～に決まっている
titleEn: Express certainty; it is obvious, it must be, no doubt
structure: Verb-casual + に決まっている, い-Adjective + に決まっている, な-Adjective + だに決まっている, Noun + だに決まっている
structureEn: Verb-casual + に決まっている, い-Adjective + に決まっている, な-Adjective + だに決まっている, Noun + だに決まっている
explanation: Dùng để thể hiện sự chắc chắn mạnh của người nói, như một điều hiển nhiên. Có thể hiểu là “chắc chắn là”, “rõ ràng là”, “nhất định là”. Cấu trúc: Verb-casual + に決まっている, い-Adjective + に決まっている, な-Adjective + だに決まっている, Noun + だに決まっている.
explanationEn: The ～に決まっている grammar point is used to express certainty or a strong conviction about a situation or event. It can be translated in English as it is obvious, it must be, or no doubt. The formation differs depending on whether it is used with a verb, い-adjective, な-adjective, or noun
editorialSources: Hanabira grammar JSON (source import)
JLPT Vietnam / JLPT Sensei Vietnam (manual QA reference only)
JLPT Global / JLPT Sensei / Practice Japanese (manual QA reference only)

title: ～に沿って
titleEn: Along with; in accordance with; following
explanation: Dùng khi làm theo một đường hướng, quy trình, chính sách, kế hoạch hoặc tiêu chuẩn đã có. Có thể hiểu là “theo”, “dựa theo”, “dọc theo”. Cấu trúc: Noun + に沿って.
explanationEn: The ～に沿って grammar point is used to express that something happens or is done along with, in accordance with, or following a particular line, path, or guideline. It is often used in instructions or explanations. The に沿って is attached to the noun representing the line, path or guideline
editorialSources: Hanabira grammar JSON (source import)
JLPT Vietnam / JLPT Sensei Vietnam (manual QA reference only)
JLPT Global / JLPT Sensei / Practice Japanese (manual QA reference only)

title: ～に過ぎない
titleEn: Expresses that something is just or nothing more than; merely, only, simply
structure: Verb-casual + に過ぎない, い-Adjective + に過ぎない, な-Adjective + に過ぎない, Noun + に過ぎない
structureEn: Verb-casual + に過ぎない, い-Adjective + に過ぎない, な-Adjective + に過ぎない, Noun + に過ぎない
explanation: Dùng để hạ thấp mức độ hoặc nhấn mạnh rằng điều gì chỉ ở phạm vi được nêu, không hơn. Có thể hiểu là “chỉ là”, “không hơn gì”. Cấu trúc: Verb-casual + に過ぎない, い-Adjective + に過ぎない, な-Adjective + に過ぎない, Noun + に過ぎない.
explanationEn: The ～に過ぎない grammar point is used to indicate that something is just or nothing more than the stated quality or condition. It implies that the thing is not as significant or important as it might seem at first glance. This grammar point can be translated as merely, only, or simply in English. It can be used with verbs, い-adjectives, な-adjectives, and nouns
editorialSources: Hanabira grammar JSON (source import)
JLPT Vietnam / JLPT Sensei Vietnam (manual QA reference only)
JLPT Global / JLPT Sensei / Practice Japanese (manual QA reference only)

title: ～に関わって
titleEn: Indicates that something is related to or influenced by a certain matter or factor; concerning, in connection with, regarding
structure: Verb-casual + に関わって, い-Adjective + に関わって, な-Adjective + に関わって, Noun + に関わって
structureEn: Verb-casual + に関わって, い-Adjective + に関わって, な-Adjective + に関わって, Noun + に関わって
explanation: Dùng khi một việc có liên quan, bị ảnh hưởng hoặc gắn với một vấn đề/yếu tố nào đó. Có thể hiểu là “liên quan đến”, “dính tới”, “về”. Cấu trúc: Verb-casual + に関わって, い-Adjective + に関わって, な-Adjective + に関わって, Noun + に関わって.
explanationEn: The ～に関わって grammar point is used to express that something is related to, influenced by, or connected with a certain matter or factor. It can be translated as concerning, in connection with, or regarding in English. The formation depends on whether it is used with a verb, い-adjective, な-adjective, or noun
editorialSources: Hanabira grammar JSON (source import)
JLPT Vietnam / JLPT Sensei Vietnam (manual QA reference only)
JLPT Global / JLPT Sensei / Practice Japanese (manual QA reference only)
